subject: sierra pacific holding company, dba siera pacific industries

emails.subject: Re: Sierra Pacific Holding Company, dba Siera Pacific Industries
emails.subject_base: Sierra Pacific Holding Company, dba Siera Pacific Industries
emails.body: Re: Sierra Pacific Holding Company, dba Siera Pacific Industries Thanks for following up on this, Rhonda. I believe you just spoke with Chris about the executed original of this contract. Please let me know what else I can do to speed this process along. I ran a search for deals the West Services desk has done with this counterparty (which were entered with Sierra Pacific Industries, Inc.) and came up with only three deal numbers. They are: 580832 580137 580136 Would you like me to change these over? Or are you doing that along with the re-confirmation? Please let me know when you get a chance. Thanks, Kate Rhonda L Denton 04/17/2001 09:19 AM

emails.subject_base: Sierra Pacific Holding Company, dba Siera Pacific Industries
emails.body: Thanks for doing that. And those deals didn't show up in my query because I was looking for trades done under the Short Term West Services desk I didn't realize Chris was also entering these under Short Term California. Just let me know if there's anything else I can do. Thanks, Kate Rhonda L Denton 04/17/2001 11:20 AM

emails.body: What about 573679, 579822, 579826 and the 2 transmission deals that are in Enpower? I will change them as soon as Sam gets the CP set up if its okay with you. Then I can tell Kim Hundle to resend the confirms. Kate Symes 04/17/2001 11:34 AM
